raw_text: Switched auth provider from Firebase to Supabase for the MagicStudio project. Firebase pricing was becoming unpredictable at scale and Supabase's Postgres-backed RLS fits our data model better.
author: maria

raw_text: team, heads up: we're moving auth to Supabase this week. Firebase was fine for prototyping but RLS in Postgres gives us row-level security we actually need for kid accounts.
author: maria

raw_text: Bug: double-invocation of handleGetHelp is firing two XP deductions per hint request. Root cause looks like a missing guard around the async call — no helpLoading state.
author: maria

raw_text: Fixed double-invocation bug in handleGetHelp by introducing helpInFlightRef and a helpLoading guard so a second click while a request is in flight is a no-op.
author: maria

raw_text: Decision log: we will not deduplicate help-assisted steps from XP entirely; instead, assisted steps earn partial score via helpTracker.js so kids still get some credit but full mastery requires solving unaided.
author: maria

raw_text: outcome of the partial-XP decision: playtesters with 3 kids said it felt fairer than an all-or-nothing model. Keeping it.
author: hassan

raw_text: Rebuilt cat SVG to match plush ginger tabby reference while preserving all existing CSS animation class names (ksc-arm-l, ksc-tail, etc.) so SpriteGuideAgent animations keep working.
author: maria

raw_text: Sprite positioning bug: paw does not align with target block when the block is in the last row of a stack. Vertical anchoring assumes a fixed block height that's wrong for wrapped blocks.
author: maria

raw_text: Fixed sprite paw-to-block alignment by computing block height dynamically instead of assuming a fixed constant. Resolves issue-95.
author: maria

raw_text: Decision: integrate level-complete.mp4 into SalutingCat.jsx as a full-screen cover video for the celebration moment, replacing the earlier CSS-only fireworks animation.
author: maria

raw_text: outcome of swapping to the mp4 celebration: initial version had a visible watermark from the source video, had to run it back through the editor to strip it before shipping.
author: maria

raw_text: Built CoinMaze.jsx with full-screen canvas rendering, touch and keyboard controls, cat sprite integration, and Web Audio API sound effects for coin pickup and level complete.
author: maria

raw_text: Balloon Pop Festival: score isn't syncing with Supabase-backed GamesHub unlock progression when a player finishes offline and reconnects.
author: hassan

raw_text: Decision: for the ClickTake admin portal CRM page, wire directly to the Supabase leads table rather than building a separate API layer, to move faster given the timeline.
author: maria

raw_text: outcome: direct Supabase wiring hit a silent RLS block — CRM leads just weren't showing up, no error thrown. Took half a day to trace back to a missing policy.
author: maria

raw_text: Maria — Full-stack developer. Background in academic computer science with coursework in image processing (spatial filtering, convolution, Sobel and Laplacian gradient operators). Experience across React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Blockly-based educational tooling.
author: maria

raw_text: Decision: keep auth on Firebase for the ResQ project specifically, separate from MagicStudio, because Firebase's phone-auth + Twilio WhatsApp integration path was already working and switching would delay the emergency-response demo.
author: maria

raw_text: quick correction for the record: we actually never fully moved off Firebase for MagicStudio auth either — email/password login still routes through Firebase, only the Postgres-backed profile data moved to Supabase. Wanted to flag before this gets written down wrong.
author: hassan
